title: 5 Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Interac e芒聙聭Transfer Profile on OAS
body_text:
5	Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e芒聙聭Transfer Profile on OAS
5.1	Overview of Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Interac Profile
View a customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer
脗庐
profile via OAS to:
Verify the
Interac
e-Transfer profile state (e.g., disabled or enabled)
View the customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer transaction limits
View the customer芒聙聶s profile history
View the customer芒聙聶s contacts
View the customer芒聙聶s Autodeposit registrations
5.2	Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Profile Summary
View the Profile Summary page to see a customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer registration details,
Interac
e-Transfer limits, and whether the state of customer芒聙聶s profile is Disabled or Enabled.
To access the profile summary page:
Search for the customer as described in Section 4.2, Basic Searches in OAS.
View the Profile Summary page. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Viewing the Profile Summary
Navigating the Profile Summary Page
The customer details are displayed on the left. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Viewing the Customer Details
The customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer limits are displayed on the right. View the limits
*
to see how much the customer has used of their daily, 7-day, and 30-day limits. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Viewing the Customer芒聙聶s e-Transfer Limits
Note:	If the
Interac
e-Transfer profile is Disabled, the customer is unable to send or receive transfers through
Interac
e-Transfer. Escalate to your corporate security team. If you are a member of your financial institution芒聙聶s corporate security team, refer to the Fraud Alert System (FAS) or to your internal OAS Fraud Analyst (if that role is in use at your financial institution).
*
Interac
脗庐
has eliminated daily, weekly, and monthly rolling limits on incoming transfers and has increased the limit on individual incoming transfers to $25,000 per transfer. Limits on incoming transfers are no longer set through Limit Group
s.
5.3	Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Profile History
View the Profile History page to see the customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer transaction and profile history.
To access the Profile History page:
Search for the customer as described in Section 4.2, Basic Searches in OAS. On the Customer Details page, select the
Profile History
tab. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Selecting the Profile History
View the customer芒聙聶s profile history, including the date that the customer was created, in the main window. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Viewing the Customer芒聙聶s Profile History
To view the customer芒聙聶s
Interac
e-Transfer transaction history:
Select the appropriate
Interac
e-Transfer transaction type. See Figure 6.
Note:	The transaction history section varies according to the user芒聙聶s transactions. For example, the Received e-Transfer(s) drop-down menu is only available if the customer has received at least one
Interac
e-Transfer transaction with the selected profile.
Figure 6: Selecting e-Transfer Transaction History by Transaction Type
View the
Interac
e-Transfer transaction history. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Viewing the Customer芒聙聶s Interac e-Transfer History
5.4	Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Contacts
View the Contact(s) page to see the customer芒聙聶s registered contacts.
To access the Contact(s) page:
Search for the customer as described in Section 4.2, Basic Searches in OAS. On the profile summary page, select the
Contact(s)
tab. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Selecting Contact(s)
View the list of contacts. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Viewing the Customer芒聙聶s Contacts
5.5	Viewing a Customer芒聙聶s Autodeposit Registrations
View the Autodeposit Registration(s) page to see the customer芒聙聶s email addresses registered for Autodeposit. The customer doesn't have to log in to online banking to receive
Interac
e-Transfer transactions from email addresses in this this list.
To access the Autodeposit Registration(s) page:
Search for the customer as described in Section 4.2, Basic Searches in OAS. On the profile summary page, select the
Autodeposit Registration(s)
tab. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Selecting Autodeposit Registration(s)
View the list of Autodeposit registrations. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Viewing the Customer芒聙聶s Autodeposit Registrations
END
